title: An Act providing for equal access to certain roadways under the jurisdiction of the department of conservation and recreation

abstracts.abstract: The committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2108) of Nick Collins for legislation to provide for equal access to certain roadways under the jurisdiction of the department of conservation and recreation on the Columbia Point peninsula located between William T. Morrissey Boulevard, William J. Day Boulevard and Dorchester Bay, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2879).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

committee on Senate Ways and Means
